result.stdout:
Usage: JayTech.Tools.StrykerSolution generate-report [options]

Options:
  --help             Show help information.
  -p|--projects      Specify one or more projects to be processed by Stryker.
                     Don't include pathing or '.csproj'
  -t|--test-project  Specify the test project to run. Don't include pathing or
                     '.csproj'
